basicInfo.name: Orkah
basicInfo.flavor: After secretly forging a pact with one of the members of the Pentagon, Orkah established dominance over maritime trade and formed an iron grip on the underground economy. While providing logistical support behind the scenes, he remains singularly focused on locating a certain —and very particular— object.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 145% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 145% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Unfair Dealings
Skill 1.desc:
4 Enemies
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 72% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Effect Probability Reduction. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 72% of Physical Attack.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Adds Effect: Ignores 40% of Defense.

Skill 2.name: Merciless Exploitation
Skill 2.desc:
4 Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Deals damage equal to 82% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 90% of Physical Attack.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Adds Effect: Ignores 40% of Defense.

Passive.name: Business Cruelty
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Revives with Immortality upon falling in battle. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - All Allies
 - Grants Effect Hit Rate Boost. [Always Active]
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Self
 - Adds Effect: 49% Effect Resist Boost. [Always Active]

Awaken Skill.name: Ultimatum
Awaken Skill.desc:
All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Deals damage equal to 55% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - Each attack deals additional damage equal to 47% of Physical Attack upon landing a critical hit.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 72% of Physical Attack.
 - Increases Damage: To 60% of Physical Attack upon dealing Crit Damage.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Adds Effect: Ignores 40% of Defense.

profile.likes: Himself, chaos, evil, simple meals, bitter tea, the color black
profile.dislikes: Almost everyone except for himself, all types of stew, labor-intensive foods, order, anything that dulls the body
profile.story: After secretly forging a pact with one of the members of the Pentagon, Orkah established dominance over maritime trade and formed an iron grip on the underground economy. While providing logistical support behind the scenes, he remains singularly focused on locating a certain —and very particular— object.

basicInfo.name: Orkah
basicInfo.flavor: Orkah re-established and extended his reach back into the black market —an arena of influence his family had withdrawn from long ago— thereby triggering an internal conflict within the family. After eliminating opposing factions, he seized control of the Scales of Pleasure, reshaping it completely.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Unfair Dealings
Skill 1.desc:
4 Enemies
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 50% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Effect Probability Reduction. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 60% of Physical Attack.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Adds Effect: Ignores 40% of Defense.

Skill 2.name: Merciless Exploitation
Skill 2.desc:
4 Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Deals damage equal to 62% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 75% of Physical Attack.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Adds Effect: Ignores 40% of Defense.

Passive.name: Business Cruelty
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Revives with Immortality upon falling in battle. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - Revives with Immortality upon falling in battle. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - All Allies
 - Grants Effect Hit Rate Boost. [Always Active]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Self
 - Increases Turns: Immortality duration becomes 3 turn(s).
 - All Allies
 - Increases Effect: Effect Hit Rate Boost to 37%.
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Self
 - Adds Effect: 49% Effect Resist Boost. [Always Active]

After eliminating opposing factions, he seized control of the Scales of Pleasure, reshaping it completely.

basicInfo.name: Orkah
basicInfo.flavor: Known as a \"living textbook of etiquette,\" Orkah enforces the family code more strictly than any other Family Head before him. However, it is also said that the moment he steps into battle, he transforms into a completely different person, almost like flipping a switch.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 90% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 90% of Physical Attack.

 - 100% chance to inflict Effect Probability Reduction. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 45% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Merciless Exploitation
Skill 2.desc:
4 Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 1 Turn(s)]
 - Deals damage equal to 57% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 57% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Business Cruelty

 - Grants All Damage Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Revives with Immortality upon falling in battle. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - All Allies

profile.story: Known as a \"living textbook of etiquette,\" Orkah enforces the family code more strictly than any other Family Head before him. However, it is also said that the moment he steps into battle, he transforms into a completely different person, almost like flipping a switch.

basicInfo.name: Orkah
basicInfo.flavor: After killing off all of his siblings in a brutal succession battle, Orkah became the heir of his family at the age of ten. Upon his father's disappearance a few years later, he ascended to the position of the youngest family head ever recorded in the history of his lineage.
